title: M3 deterministic replay lands via the One Merge (was jssm#827)
manager: The M3 deterministic-replay engine is already built on the v6 integration branch but main can't see it; the One Merge PR brings it home as part of 6.0's feature payload. Replay — re-running a machine from a seed and getting the identical trace — is the substrate the whole proof, receipts, and durable-execution stack later stands on, which is why closing the dual-track and landing it is a 6.0 gate rather than a nice-to-have.
cs: closed by the One Merge (WP-4); M3 = §15 replay core; the merge takes the 6.0.0 line on `jssm.ts`/compiler/peg/`package.json` conflicts and `--theirs`+rebuild on all generated artifacts.
